name: IEB Menu
description: A high-quality mod menu for Geometry Dash, developed by IEB Studio. This project is built by enhancing the Eclipse source code. Thanks to everyone involved in the development of Eclipse.

legacy-render.name: Use Legacy rendering
legacy-render.description: Disables some newer OpenGL features, which can solve some rendering issues on older hardware (at the cost of performance).

reset-theme.name: Reset theme?
reset-theme.description: Reset the theme to the default one.

menu-keybind.name: Menu Keybind
menu-keybind.description: The keybind to open the IEB menu.

menu-style.name: Menu Style
menu-style.description: Choose the style of the IEB menu.
